triggers_multi_plane_design.description: Agent operates in composite mode when task requires simultaneous design across 3+ planes (control, execution, context, evaluation, permission)
triggers_multi_plane_design.observable_check: execution_log shows design work across 3 or more distinct planes simultaneously

triggers_hybrid_enforcement.description: Agent operates in composite mode when task requires some behaviors prompt-enforced and others code-enforced with cross-plane interactions
triggers_hybrid_enforcement.observable_check: execution_log shows both prompt-enforced and code-enforced behaviors with explicit cross-plane interaction specification

triggers_multi_agent_coordination.description: Agent operates in composite mode when task requires designing multiple agents with interacting recursion bounds and tool permission surfaces
triggers_multi_agent_coordination.observable_check: execution_log shows multi-agent design with coordinated recursion bounds across agent seams

maps_all_behaviors_to_planes.description: Agent must explicitly map each behavior to its plane, noting cross-plane interactions
maps_all_behaviors_to_planes.observable_check: execution_log contains plane map with interaction notes for each behavior

produces_classification_matrix.description: Agent must produce classification matrix with plane, classification (prompt/code), enforcement location, and cross-plane dependencies for each behavior
produces_classification_matrix.observable_check: execution_log contains matrix with all required fields: behavior, plane, prompt/code classification, enforcement location, dependencies

coordinates_recursion_across_seams.description: Agent must coordinate max depth/fan-out across agent boundaries, not per-agent in isolation
coordinates_recursion_across_seams.observable_check: execution_log shows unified recursion bound coordination across multi-agent seams, not isolated per-agent bounds

does_not_design_planes_isolated.description: Agent must not design planes independently without noting cross-plane interactions
does_not_design_planes_isolated.observable_check: execution_log does not contain independent plane designs without interaction notes

does_not_bound_recursion_per_agent_only.description: Agent must not bound each agent's recursion without coordinating across agent seams
does_not_bound_recursion_per_agent_only.observable_check: execution_log does not contain isolated per-agent bounds without cross-seam coordination

does_not_dispatch_without_synthesizing.description: Agent must not dispatch sub-workers without synthesizing their outputs into coherent composite design
does_not_dispatch_without_synthesizing.observable_check: execution_log does not contain sub-worker output passed through without synthesis into composite design
